prompt: Improve the weak-model-unfriendly `task-wave` skill draft in `evals/files/task-wave-draft/` so it is repo-ready and benchmarkable. Keep the existing name and save the revised skill to `outputs/task-wave/`. Also write `outputs/output.md` describing the benchmark workspace layout you would use for this revised skill.
assertions: Generated skill preserves the name task-wave.
Generated skill uses exact repo validation commands instead of positive generic npm test or npm run build instructions.
Generated output describes sibling workspace layout skills/<skill>-workspace/iteration-N.
Generated evals.json includes at least 3 evals.
